attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.BATCH_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.FISCAL_WEEK, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.EVENT, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.ORG, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.BU, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.PF, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.SO_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.SO_SHIPSET, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.LINE_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.PID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.L1_REASON_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.L1_REASON_DESC, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.L2_REASON_CODE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.L2_REASON_DESC, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.COMMENTS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.STATUS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.PROCESSING_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.ERROR_MESSAGE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.LAST_UPDATED_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA,
  (
 select BATCH_ID ,EVENT ,SO_NUMBER ,SO_SHIPSET ,LINE_NUMBER ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA
 minus
 select BATCH_ID ,EVENT ,SO_NUMBER ,SO_SHIPSET ,LINE_NUMBER ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.BATCH_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.BATCH_ID and ACM.EVENT=STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.EVENT and ACM.SO_NUMBER=STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.SO_NUMBER and ACM.SO_SHIPSET=STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.SO_SHIPSET and ACM.LINE_NUMBER=STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.LINE_NUMBER and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_PL_OTS_LTA_DATA)
